case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. BOBBY MATHIS et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MATHIS, BOBBY DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-03-2010
DECLARATION RE: 1. REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT 2. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS 3. INTEREST 4. WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MATHIS, BOBBY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $239.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MATHIS, BOBBY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATHIS, BOBBY $1,948.49 PRINCIPAL, $156.95 INTEREST, $239.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,344.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MATHIS, BOBBY

DECLARATION RE COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1044 (B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
